_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: AuraVisionHeroGradient
_meta.description: AuraVision by Ruixen is a unique AI-powered component that lets users upload their photos and instantly discover the emotional and energetic impression they project. Merging deep learning with creative insight, this tool reveals the subtle patterns, colors, and moods your image communicates—whether you're looking to understand your personal vibe or simply explore how others perceive your presence.
